summary: The village is in chaos after the demonic invasion, with many innocent villagers being sacrificed. The demon Azazel has possessed the body of a powerful warrior and is using his abilities to wreak havoc on the village. Elric and others are trying to stop him, but they seem to be outmatched by the sheer power of the demons.
key_moments: Elric discovers a hidden block of ice created by M-MY Goodness, which is blocking their path.
The villagers discover that Azazel has been resurrected and is using his powers to destroy the village.
Elric and others are trying to figure out how to stop Azazel's resurrection and save the village.
